sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20005" key="bi/tos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βίτος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20005.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tyre, Edict. Diocl.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:15:31a" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.31a</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βιτωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with tyres</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τροχοί</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σαράγαρα, καροῦχον β.</foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with tyred wheels</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
